mechanics.excerpt: idate group of characters would use the highest base TN from among all the characters in the group and add +1 for each addi- tional person in the group: Intimidation is also useful as complement to such skills as Interrogation, Streetwise and Negotiation under certain cir- cumstances the gamemaster decides that Intimidation might help the player' 5 cause looming intimidator nearby will apply negative modifier to the TN equal to the Margin of Success of an Intimidation Check against the target = CHA WIL (+2 for Brave).
